title: Tangy Dense Uruguayan Chicken Broth
description: A hearty and refreshing Uruguayan-inspired chicken broth, perfect for post-workout meals. This paleo-friendly dish is made with chicken stock, poached chicken, and a blend of tangy spices.
instructions: In a large pot, combine chicken stock, lime juice, oregano, cilantro, garlic, and ginger. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the chicken to the pot and poach for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the pot and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it into thin strips.
Strain the broth through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean pot, discarding the solids.
Add the sliced chicken back to the pot and season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Simmer the broth over low heat for an additional 5 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve the broth hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
Let the broth cool completely before refrigerating or freezing for later use.
Reheat the broth to an internal temperature of at least 165°F (74°C) before serving.
